name: staff@tinaforminnesota.com
subject: We must be really clear on what happens if Trump wins here:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
More judges for Trump, more attacks on our environment, and complete repeal of healthcare.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-may?refcode=rtw_20190508_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend -- we wanted to follow up with you on Tina's email from yesterday. Trump, Pence, and the GOP are doing everything in their power to win this Minnesota Senate seat. Their super PACs are spending big, they're visiting the state to rile up their Tea Party base, and we know this is just the start. **And we must be really clear on what happens if they win and send this seat into Republican hands: more judges and Supreme Court appointments for Donald Trump, no chance for Democrats to take back the Senate, and what could be the deciding vote to take away healthcare from millions of people.** I know you don't want that to happen, team. But we are falling short of what we needed to raise to combat their plan (about $5,680 left), and as a key member of this team, we need you to have Tina's back. **[Can you please donate $10 or as much as you can before midnight to help Tina win in Minnesota and keep this U.S. Senate seat in Democratic hands?](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-may?refcode=rtw_20190508_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** [PITCH IN](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-may?refcode=rtw_20190508_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") If you want to put a full stop to Trump's plan to pack the courts and drive through his extreme conservative agenda -- then we must retake the Senate. And that cannot happen without holding this seat for Democrats. Counting on you, Team Tina
---

name: Team Tomlinson
subject: Straight out the gates and into action
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinsonforsenatelaunch?refcode=em_header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinsonforsenatelaunch?refcode=em_header]
Dear Friend –
Teresa’s campaign for U.S. Senate is gaining momentum fast. Every day of this race, Teresa is working hard to build the type of campaign that can turn Georgia blue – because the challenges to Georgian values are real and they are affecting Americans every day.
Here are some updates from the trail to catch you up to speed:
In the News
The New York Times noted that Teresa “may now be best positioned to become her party’s leading option.” The Washington Post covered Teresa’s plans for fixing health care, reducing pay inequity and student debt relief. But that was only the beginning. Teresa’s campaign launch “allowed Tomlinson to raise roughly $300,000 and hire veteran operatives to run her campaign” noted the Columbus Ledger-Enquirer .
Human Rights Campaign Atlanta Gala
On Saturday, Teresa joined the 32nd Annual Human Rights Campaign Atlanta Gala in standing up for LGBT equality. The Human Rights Campaign and many more organizations serve a critical function in advancing equal rights for the LGBT community, particularly at a time when the federal government is taking steps nearly every day to reverse the hard-won progress we’ve made. Teresa stands with the community - whether for a transgender student or a soldier who wants to serve their country, everyone is entitled to equal protection under the law. We look forward to elevating the voices of Georgia’s LGBT activists and working in concert with them to put equality first.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinsonforsenatelaunch?refcode=em050819-b&noskip=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinsonforsenatelaunch?refcode=em050819-b&noskip=true]
Additions to Team Tomlinson
Team Teresa has exciting news! We’ve added two more phenomenal women to our team to elect Georgia’s first woman to serve in the U.S. Senate:
Edana Walker joins Team Tomlinson as Finance Director. She most recently worked as Finance Director and Deputy Campaign Manager for Stacey Abrams’ 2018 gubernatorial campaign. Edana is a graduate of the historically black Spelman College in Atlanta, and we’re thrilled to have her.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinsonforsenatelaunch?refcode=em050819-b&noskip=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinsonforsenatelaunch?refcode=em050819-b&noskip=true]
Stephanie Berger joins us as another political fundraising phenom and a principal of Berger Hirschberg Strategies. In addition, Stephanie is a Sweet Briar Sister of Teresa’s, having also graduated from Sweet Briar College.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinsonforsenatelaunch?refcode=em050819-b&noskip=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinsonforsenatelaunch?refcode=em050819-b&noskip=true]
This campaign will make history.
Georgia has never elected a woman serve in the Senate in its 231 years as a state. As the first woman partner in her firm and first woman Mayor of Columbus, Teresa is accustomed to shattering glass ceilings. While women’s rights are being threatened and the U.S. Supreme Court continues to lurch rightward, we need more women champions in Washington to ensure that the clock isn’t turned back on progress. Teresa is ready to fight back on every front that opens in this current war on women.
Georgia’s Choice Ban
Speaking of the assault on women’s rights, Georgia Governor Brian Kemp just made Georgia the latest battlefield, signing a ban on abortion at just six weeks of pregnancy, before most women even know they are pregnant. Teresa’s view? If these Republican legislators don’t trust women to make these most personal decisions, we will no longer trust them to hold leadership positions. Teresa started a petition , calling on women across the country to fight back anywhere these choice bans arise and defeat any politicians who advocate for them.
Winning this race is going to take every one of us doing what we can. We are heartened by the 1200+ donations Teresa’s campaign has already received, showing that Georgia is ready for new, improved leadership. We are excited to announce that we are extending the Founding Donor program through the end of May, so there’s still time for you to raise your hand to be counted as a Founding Donor of Teresa’s campaign. Chip in any amount now, and help Teresa make history.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinsonforsenatelaunch?refcode=em050819-b&noskip=true]
Thank you for all of your support as we begin this journey.
See you on the trail!
Team Tomlinson
<<View this email in your browser.>> [https://teresatomlinson.com/newsletter-founding-donor-deadline/]

name: Chair Mary Mancini
subject: This is Why I'm Excited About the 2020 Primary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
Peter

The Goal:

Make Donald Trump a one term president.

The Options:

Over 20 candidates running to be our Democratic Nominee.

I know a lot of people are getting fired up for the 2020 Democratic Presidential Primary. I am too. But I’m not just excited for one or two candidates. I'm excited about the whole amazing slate!

Our candidates share common goals that represent who we are as Americans, in sharp contrast to Trump. Just take a look at a few of the policies they're running on:

Helping America's middle class get ahead

Ensuring that every American can access affordable, quality health care

Providing affordable higher education so students can graduate debt-free

Facing climate change head-on and creating more good-paying, clean-energy jobs

As a Tennessee Democrat, I know that you want everyone to have their fair shot at the American Dream. Donald Trump only cares about one thing: Donald J. Trump.

Click Here to Donate $25 a month to help get Donald Trump out of the White House in 2020: https://act.myngp.com/Forms/5376519708215610368

Trump and the Republican Party raised a whopping $76 million in the first quarter of this year alone -- that's 21 times more than President Obama had raised for his reelection by this point. Our eventual Democratic presidential nominee needs strong state Democratic Parties now to build a strong infrastructure capable of lifting them and their policies to victory.

We have already started the critical work of building this infrastructure, with great county party leadership elections last month, the launch of our new constituency caucuses this month, and some amazing events coming up across the state this summer.

If you’re ready to commit to building a strong party infrastructure now, not next year when it may already be too late, please consider a sustaining contribution of $25 a month to support our mission today
https://act.myngp.com/Forms/5376519708215610368

Thank you,

Mary Mancini

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Help make sure this matters in 2020
body:
| | Peter, In the past week, Israel has endured a stream of rocket attacks. I’m so glad our President has expressed unwavering support for our allies. _“Once again, Israel faces a barrage of deadly rocket attacks by terrorist groups Hamas and Islamic Jihad. We support Israel 100% in its defense of its citizens...”_
–President Trump We must remember if the outcome of the 2016 election had gone differently, America’s support for Israel would not have been so strong. President Trump made a decision that past presidents had been too timid to make. He had the courage to uphold the Jerusalem Embassy Act of 1995 that had been pushed to the side by presidential waivers for 23 years. In just a few days, on May 14, we will celebrate the first anniversary of the opening of the U.S. Embassy in Jerusalem, an historic event I had the honor of attending last year. Trump’s decision not only strengthened the United States’ relationship with our strongest ally in the Middle East, but it signaled to the international community that America has new leadership willing to act boldly in the best interest of the American people and the world, rather than cave to the demands of terrorists and dictators. **_YOU made this possible. Thousands of you used the My Faith Votes messaging tool to send emails to President Trump urging him to do what no president before him had done for over two decades_.** **There are two competing foreign policy philosophies among the 2020 candidates. One view believes America should send money to our enemies (as seen in the past administration’s Iran Deal), while the other supports the recent decisions of this administration to secure America and advocate for peace and freedom.**
* Trump’s administration spoke out in support of the Venezuelan people and recognized the opposition leader, Juan Guaidó, who will bring liberty to the people passionately fighting against Dictator Maduro.
* The administration responded to Iranian threats over the weekend by sending the USS Abraham Lincoln and a bomber task force to ensure no threats from Iran come to fruition.
* Trump’s administration has been working relentlessly to secure our borders so terrorists cannot walk across and drugs flow over into our country.

**_This is what we call peace through strength_.** **My Faith Votes has a goal of reaching 90-million Christians in America to vote in 2020 and most importantly, to vote in support of Israel and policies that advance peace and freedom.** Thanks to your generous support, we’ve already started working on voter mobilization in every state and district in America. **But our plan requires additional financial support for direct mail to reach every Christian household, SMS targeting to mobilize critical districts, and an on-the-ground mobilization effort in certain states where it is critical for Christians to turn out.** Imagine what would become of our country - and of Israel - if voters didn’t bring their Judeo-Christian values to the next elections! I can promise, when you contribute to My Faith Votes your gift will be stewarded wisely and put to great use ensuring millions of people stand for biblical values at the polls. We cannot afford to wait to put our strategy into place. We must roll up our sleeves and act now to reach and equip faith voters with the right information to cast their ballot. **[Please make your best donation, of any amount, to support the work of My Faith Votes today](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190509apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190509apl01nd&n=1)!** We must be a nation that stands with Israel and for Biblical values. [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190509apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190509apl01nd&n=2) **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190509apl01nd&n=3)
---

Thanks to your generous support, we’ve already started working on voter mobilization in every state and district in America. But our plan requires additional financial support for direct mail to reach every Christian household, SMS targeting to mobilize critical districts, and an on-the-ground mobilization effort in certain states where it is critical for Christians to turn out. Imagine what would become of our country - and of Israel - if voters didn’t bring their Judeo-Christian values to the next elections! I can promise, when you contribute to My Faith Votes your gift will be stewarded wisely and put to great use ensuring millions of people stand for biblical values at the polls. We cannot afford to wait to put our strategy into place. We must roll up our sleeves and act now to reach and equip faith voters with the right information to cast their ballot. ! We must be a nation that stands with Israel and for Biblical values. United. We Stand. Gov. Mike Huckabee Honorary National Chairman ©2019 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

name: Team Kamala
subject: Our Pride collection is here!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
Pride Month is just around the corner (in June!). It’s a time to celebrate how far we've come in the fight for LGBTQ* rights and recommit ourselves to building a future where equality and justice endures. One of the reasons our team is working to make sure Kamala is our next president is because of the role she has played in that fight. She led the team that helped bring down Proposition 8 in 2013 and made sure marriage equality was the law of the land. And she conducted some of California’s first same-sex marriages way back in 2004. **Kamala has been at the forefront of some of our toughest civil rights battles.** So, we thought we'd _show_ our pride for her and the fight for LGBTQ* equality with a limited-edition line of Pride gear for June. Grab a sticker, shirt, tote, or one of our other new items to wear your support -- as a way to celebrate what our movement stands for and keep up the fight to elect a champion for LGBTQ* rights as our next president. **[As one of Kamala’s biggest supporters, we want you to have first dibs on our new Pride collection. Head to the official Kamala store to grab your special, limited edition gear -- and show off your pride for the people»](https://action.kamalaharris.org/go/9426?t=1&akid=4668%2E5755789%2Ez54W0c)** | | [ Shop now ](https://action.kamalaharris.org/go/9426?t=2&akid=4668%2E5755789%2Ez54W0c)

— Team Kamala

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Mueller Cleared President Trump — Now Get Over It
body:
"For two years, the Democratic Party held out hope that the legal system would undo their loss in 2016. They refused to make peace with..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9a2673ccb0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Mueller Cleared President Trump — Now Get Over It**

“It’s now been more than six weeks since special counsel Bob Mueller, the former FBI director, concluded his investigation into Russia’s interference in our 2016 election . . . It’s been two weeks since Attorney General William Barr made the 450-page report public. This investigation went on for two years. It’s finally over,” Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell (R-KY) writes in the _New York Post_.

“For two years, the Democratic Party held out hope that the legal system would undo their loss in 2016. They refused to make peace with the American people’s choice. But the American people elected this president. They did. The American people voted for change.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=030c937978&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Democrats are angry the special counsel’s report did not produce the material or conclusions they expected to pave their path to impeaching President Trump. You can’t help but notice the phrase ‘Russian collusion’ has vanished from Democratic talking points and left a void in their narrative,” Rep. Doug Collins (R-GA), the top Republican lawmaker on the House Judiciary Committee, writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b4536d3183&e=3ee4985eea). “So Democrats have resolved to neutralize Barr by attacking his integrity . . . What a cynical, mean-spirited, counterproductive and irresponsible step it is.”
---
|
---
| “China is up to its old tricks on trade, but it’s learning the hard way that there’s a new sheriff in town: President Trump,” the _[New York Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bddca8871b&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes. “China has operated in bad faith not only in negotiations, but in its actual trade policies, time and again breaking promises to stop stealing intellectual property and trade secrets. Let’s be honest: It was Beijing that started this war. Yet until Trump, America declined to fight back.”
---
|
---
| “There may be light at the end of the tunnel for the beleaguered town of Lordstown. President Donald Trump tweeted Wednesday that General Motors has agreed to sell the shuttered Chevrolet plant to an electric truck manufacturer,” Drew Scofield reports for [News 5 Cleveland](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0e36f290af&e=3ee4985eea). “During a visit to the Lima in March, Trump called for the plant to be sold so local workers could be employed again.”
---
|
---
| “Nearly 100,000 people were taken into custody along the southern border in April after illegally crossing from Mexico into the United States, marking the highest number in one month since April 2007, according to new federal data,” Anna Giaritelli reports for the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9bb7ad0d06&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Department of Homeland Security numbers show U.S. Border Patrol agents in Texas, New Mexico, Arizona, and California apprehended 98,977 people who crossed between ports of entry in areas that do and do not have barriers.”
---
|
---
| “With this being National Small Business Week across our country, let’s remember that America’s new era of economic prosperity is due to finally having a businessman like President Trump in the White House,” Sen. Mike Braun (R-IN) writes in [Fox Business](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=85f128b5d6&e=3ee4985eea). “The economic numbers speak for themselves”—5.4 million new jobs, wages up 2.7 percent, and the unemployment rate now at a historically low 3.6 percent.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8efaba1659&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=22e6d0e67f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=6fb9556219)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:
It's National Small Business Week, Peter!
| | **It 's National Small Business Week, Peter!**

This week may be the designated time to honor our district's and our nation's small businesses, but here at Spanberger for Congress HQ, we're always celebrating the contributions of local businesses to our economy.

You might be surprised to learn how many small businesses call Virginia home. They are run by diverse owners and operate in diverse industries, but together, they make up the patchwork of our dynamic state economy -- and Abigail is representing the interests of each and every one of them. **[**Learn more about Virginia 's small businesses, then chip in to help keep Abigail in Congress fighting for policies that invest in them. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/OJ0hez4ma0rDO8XAGOYCTeZR2PJkf11bMYXHUIQiLo0=/iVFKeBk6oKu6vufJM-3HbV7npfruz4iXHXd9AiT4dGg=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.09_b1_ts_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)** **> > More than 250,000 employees across the state of Virginia work for a minority-owned small business.** | ****[Chip in $25 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/OJ0hez4ma0rDO8XAGOYCTeZR2PJkf11bMYXHUIQiLo0=/iVFKeBk6oKu6vufJM-3HbV7npfruz4iXHXd9AiT4dGg=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.09_b1_ts_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)****
---

**> > 47.2% of Virginia's workforce is employed by a small business.** ****[Chip in $47 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/OJ0hez4ma0rDO8XAGOYCTeZR2PJkf11bMYXHUIQiLo0=/iVFKeBk6oKu6vufJM-3HbV7npfruz4iXHXd9AiT4dGg=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.09_b1_ts_all&amount=47&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)****
---

**> > There are nearly 750,000 small businesses across Virginia -- and that number is constantly growing.** ****[Chip in $75 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/OJ0hez4ma0rDO8XAGOYCTeZR2PJkf11bMYXHUIQiLo0=/iVFKeBk6oKu6vufJM-3HbV7npfruz4iXHXd9AiT4dGg=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.09_b1_ts_all&amount=75&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)****
---

**> > Of all of the businesses that call Virginia home, 99.5% of them are small businesses.** ****[Chip in $99 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/OJ0hez4ma0rDO8XAGOYCTeZR2PJkf11bMYXHUIQiLo0=/iVFKeBk6oKu6vufJM-3HbV7npfruz4iXHXd9AiT4dGg=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.09_b1_ts_all&amount=99&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)****
---
Despite their large contributions to our economy, our job market, and our way of life, small businesses don't always have the loudest voice in Congress. That's because of entrenched politicians who trade their votes for campaign cash from huge special interests.

**Abigail will never put special interests ahead of the people she serves in Congress.**

She's representing the interests of local businesses -- not special interests -- in Washington. She doesn't accept corporate PAC money because she wants to meet with businesses, large and small, and talk about the issues that impact them. Just like the Virginia businesses across our district, our campaign relies on community support to keep our operations running strong, **not corporate PAC donations.**
****[Peter, we need your help to keep this seat in the hands of the people -- not special interests -- so small businesses can get the support they need from Washington. Can you chip in with a donation of any size to support Abigail's re-election campaign in a true toss-up district? >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/OJ0hez4ma0rDO8XAGOYCTeZR2PJkf11bMYXHUIQiLo0=/iVFKeBk6oKu6vufJM-3HbV7npfruz4iXHXd9AiT4dGg=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.09_b1_ts_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)****

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Add your name: We need to cap credit card interest rates at 15%. For too long, big financial institutions have been committing usury by charging people exorbitant fees. Become a citizen co-sponsor of my Loan Shark Prevention Act.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
Sky-high interest rates mean bank CEOs don’t need to hide in dark alleys like loan sharks of old.
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1303%2E150750%2Evw73fo)

Sisters, Brothers, Friends:
Loan sharks charging exorbitant interest rates have moved from the shadows of the criminal underworld to broad daylight in corporate boardrooms.
You’re not going to see Jamie Dimon — the CEO of JPMorgan Chase — lurking in a dark alley. He doesn’t need to. Thanks to sky high fees, usurious interest rates, and plain Wall Street greed he's now worth $1.4 billion.
Millions of people now pay credit card interest rates as high as 30 percent. That’s not banking. That’s loan sharking. And it’s time to stop it.
**That is why I am introducing the Loan Shark Prevention Act in the Senate. This plan will cap credit card interest rates at 15 percent** so that we can stop financial institutions from extorting the American people.
I’m inviting you to become a citizen co-sponsor of the Loan Shark Prevention Act. While I am introducing this plan with some of my colleagues in Congress, **I want to send an unmistakable message to big banks that our movement is right alongside us.**
[ Add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the Loan Shark Prevention Act to cap credit card interest rates at 15 percent. Let’s show big banks that their time of ripping off the American people is over. ](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_loan_shark_prevention/?source=em190509-1-30&t=2&akid=1303%2E150750%2Evw73fo)
**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_loan_shark_prevention/?source=em190509-1-30&t=3&akid=1303%2E150750%2Evw73fo)
It didn’t always used to be this bad for consumers. But a Supreme Court decision in 1978 overturned state-based interest rate caps, which were as low as 8 percent. Congress capped credit union interest rates at 15 percent in 1980. And as recently as 1991, the Senate voted for a 14 percent cap on credit card interest rates.
Those days are long-gone. Now big box stores issue credit cards to customers with interest rates around 27 percent. That means if you buy a bed mattress for $600 on a store card, you’ll pay an additional $162 in interest.
Call it what you will — usury, extortion, loan sharking — in any case, it is an unacceptable burden.
Companies and their CEOs are getting rich off of this, of course. The CEO of American Express walked away with $370 million in total compensation. Stores like Macy’s and Kohl’s make at least 35 percent of their TOTAL income from interest rates on credit cards.
In addition to capping credit card interest rates, I want to allow the Postal Service to offer banking options. We need to expand access to banking for people left behind by big banks.
The American people are sick and tired of being ripped off by the same financial institutions that they bailed out ten years ago. They are sick and tired of being extorted by credit card companies. It is time for us to take decisive action.
[ Will you add your name here to support capping credit card interest rates at 15 percent? Please add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of my Loan Shark Prevention Act and to show support for expanding banking options.](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_loan_shark_prevention/?source=em190509-1-30&t=4&akid=1303%2E150750%2Evw73fo)
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**Credit card companies are modern-day loan sharks, charging usurious interest rates up to 30 percent. This is extortion. And Bernie has a plan to stop it.
Add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the Loan Shark Prevention Act to stand up to big banks ripping off the American people. **
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_loan_shark_prevention/?source=em190509-1-30&t=5&akid=1303%2E150750%2Evw73fo)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=1303%2E150750%2Evw73fo). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=7&akid=1303%2E150750%2Evw73fo). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=8&refcode2=1303_150750_vw73fo&akid=1303%2E150750%2Evw73fo).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=9&akid=1303%2E150750%2Evw73fo).

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Teacher Appreciation Week needs to be about more than words
body:
Here at America Next, we’ve created a K-12 Education Reform proposal.
Hello Everyone,
Teacher Appreciation Week is a reminder of all that teachers do for our children, and it’s also a reminder of the importance of maintaining high standards in education systems nationwide.

Unfortunately, while teachers work hard and do the best they can, many are hindered by failing education systems. In fact, despite massive increases in education spending over the last three decades, 58% of Americans think the curriculum used in their community’s schools needs to change.

These children are our future, and we need to give them the best chance we can. **More money, more government, and more union power have only made these problems worse;_we need real reforms to solve our education crisis._**

Here at America Next, we’ve created a K-12 Education Reform proposal. It’s a community-driven plan that gives parents and educators the freedom to cater to their students’ unique needs while holding every education system to high standards that will ensure students succeed.

We need to get the government, unions, and bureaucracy off the backs of teachers and parents, and bring education back to its primary job - to nurture the growth of students in every community.

[If you’d like to learn more about the America Next K-12 Education Reform Proposal, click here](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=7d58635b52d64de0b138d5042d63d6cc&_e=ff8JBRdRppQXdZYowmeLJguXCedeN72PkVCSbTiBM6nsguKdnPYkszA4uDnXYPJMrwWweWoUA-cUIT_O_SchzsfAjr36O0U_D9qaRaZDP1GCdCFzJk-9XEz6m4zZ7GO1tNFlOTGtui7Hd7gr1mgIbo16gc2TDEI-loMWBXfciFCYsC94cKq5x9e_XidgnivqUQ9LW_R6b_71x3aDIAWoYFXVQFWDtCItpHrLw5rewCjdH5Oocge2RrnX1tRl6pIhhhwBYezGEqYhbUCV45UkmLkAnJUkJB4Im3j5lUmM6af9UZJS9eUzYurcveF51X_Ic7x2Az_eMB5OCq_qC7SOcwlmOjUOUDWuWDiIL53-3cg%3D).

Happy Teacher Appreciation Week to all the teachers nationwide. Thank you for all you do, and know that we are on your team.

Sincerely,

Bobby Jindal

What if I told you that Dallas, Texas is leading the way for the political revolution? That may sound like a load of BS, but check it out.
# [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a53e/bed43eb/979520eb/75fb73b8/3575353892/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-header-OR")
Friends,
What if I told you that Dallas, Texas is leading the way for the political revolution? That may sound like a load of BS, but check it out.
Dallas could become the largest city with an Our Revolution-endorsed mayor if Scott Griggs wins his runoff next month. Scott's a real populist who's running right at the corporate establishment - and that's why our local grassroots army is mobilizing tens of thousands of voters through phone calls, texts, and good old fashioned door-knocking to put Scott over the top.
[**Will you donate $5 right now to help Our Revolution continue to build local power? Help us elect Scott Griggs as mayor of Dallas and continue to add more victories to the 185 progressive candidates we 've helped to elect since our political revolution started.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a53e/bed43eb/979520eb/75fb73bb/3575353892/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-hightower?refcode=em190509-snd&noskip=true")
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a53e/bed43eb/979520eb/75fb73bb/3575353892/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-hightower?refcode=em190509-snd&noskip=true")**
Victory in the Dallas election would send a signal to people across our state and our country that if we organize a powerful grassroots electoral movement, there is no race that we cannot win.
Members of Our Revolution are helping elect mayors - not just in blue states but in places like Mississippi, Alabama, Georgia... and Texas. Our candidates have taken on the corporate interests and political establishments of their communities and emerged victorious with the people behind them.
There is nothing stopping us from winning this race. Right now, we have an organizer in Dallas helping to rally the community to turn out for the June 8 runoff election. The Our Revolution Texas State Organizing Committee is fielding even more candidates for elections in the coming weeks and months. We have plans to invest even more into local races like the Dallas mayoral runoff, but we need your support in order to do it.
[**Will you donate $5 right now to Our Revolution? Help us elect Scott Griggs as mayor of Dallas and continue to add more victories to the 185 candidates we 've helped to elect since our political revolution started.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a53e/bed43eb/979520eb/75fb73bb/3575353892/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-hightower?refcode=em190509-snd&noskip=true")
This is about building local power. It is about building a bench of progressive elected officials to run for higher office. It is about grassroots organizing with local groups to transform the Democratic Party so that we can win policies like Medicare for All, a $15 minimum wage, and save our planet from ecological disaster.
What Our Revolution aims to do is unprecedented. We want to bring millions of people into the political process not just to elect a president, but win back the 1,000 seats that Democrats have lost over the past decade. We are working to transform our communities with a bottom-up approach to government and create lasting, structural change to further the progressive agenda.
**[We can't do this without you. Donate $5 right now to help elect Scott Griggs in the Dallas mayoral runoff and continue elevating the next generation of progressive leaders.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a53e/bed43eb/979520eb/75fb73bb/3575353892/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-hightower?refcode=em190509-snd&noskip=true")**
Thank you for taking this massive step toward transforming a major American city. The ramifications of this election will be felt throughout Texas and our country.
In Solidarity,
Jim Hightower
Board Member
Our Revolution

Members of Our Revolution are helping elect mayors - not just in blue states but in places like Mississippi, Alabama, Georgia... and Texas. Our candidates have taken on the corporate interests and political establishments of their communities and emerged victorious with the people behind them. There is nothing stopping us from winning this race. Right now, we have an organizer in Dallas helping to rally the community to turn out for the June 8 runoff election. The Our Revolution Texas State Organizing Committee is fielding even more candidates for elections in the coming weeks and months. We have plans to invest even more into local races like the Dallas mayoral runoff, but we need your support in order to do it. "" This is about building local power. It is about building a bench of progressive elected officials to run for higher office. It is about grassroots organizing with local groups to transform the Democratic Party so that we can win policies like Medicare for All, a $15 minimum wage, and save our planet from ecological disaster. What Our Revolution aims to do is unprecedented. We want to bring millions of people into the political process not just to elect a president, but win back the 1,000 seats that Democrats have lost over the past decade. We are working to transform our communities with a bottom-up approach to government and create lasting, structural change to further the progressive agenda. "" Thank you for taking this massive step toward transforming a major American city. The ramifications of this election will be felt throughout Texas and our country. In Solidarity, Jim Hightower Board Member Our Revolution "" PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. | | | The choice is clear. The stakes are high. And the clock is ticking. On one side sits a senator tethered to Donald Trump, subsidized by special interests, and unwilling to hold a town hall meeting in the last two years. We deserve leaders who will stand up to this administration--and any other--that violates our values. Leaders who will listen to their constituents instead of their corporate contributors. That's exactly the kind of senator I will be. campaign was first to launch a voter contact program, right out of the
gate.

The bad news is that other candidates in this race have well-funded super
PACs spending in their favor. That money can help them reach huge numbers
of people in a short amount of time via television ads, and other
expensive tactics.

We’re running this campaign differently. The way we’re going to win this
election will come down to people-talking-to-people about our shared
values and ambitions. But talking to each person takes time, so we need
your help.

If one out of every ten people reading this email can commit to knocking
on 50 doors now, we’ll be in good shape for this point in the race. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/canvass-for-beto/?source=ema20190509&t=1001&akid=30375%2E444211%2EEQ6iMo ]Can
you sign up to knock on doors in your neighborhood at a time that works
for you? (50 doors usually takes about two hours)

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/canvass-for-beto/?source=ema20190509&t=1002&akid=30375%2E444211%2EEQ6iMo ]Knock on doors for Beto »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17006?source=ema20190509&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=30375%2E444211%2EEQ6iMo ](If you can’t knock on doors, please pitch in $3 to our
voter contact program. Every donation helps grow our field team and keeps
our powerful organizing tools running.)

Tons of people are still making up their minds about who to vote for. But
knocking on doors is incredibly important at this stage. Right now, our
primary objective is to identify potential supporters and the issues they
care about. The info we gather now is critical so we can reach out later
with key updates and keep the conversation going with undecided people.

Look, two hours is a
small part of one day -- but if all of us do our share, we can accomplish
something truly amazing.

Thank you for being part of this,

Team Beto

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190509footer&t=1004&refcode2=30375_444211_EQ6iMo&akid=30375%2E444211%2EEQ6iMo
